Name: Dyn - Create an A Record
Description:
Creates an A record in the specified zone with the specified details. 

NOTE: The API User MUST have the follow permissions:
	- UserLogin
	- UserChangepw
	- RecordAdd
	- RecordUpdate
        - RecordGet
	- ZoneGet
	- ZoneAddNode
	- ZonePublish
	- ZoneChangeset

Parameters.Name: dynCustomerName
Parameters.Label: Dyn Customer Name
Parameters.HelpText: The Dyn customer name,  usually the company name

Parameters.Name: dynUserName
Parameters.Label: Dyn User Name
Parameters.HelpText:
User Name of the user that will perform this step

NOTE: The API User MUST have the follow permissions:
	- UserLogin
	- UserChangepw
	- RecordAdd
	- RecordUpdate
        - RecordGet
	- ZoneGet
	- ZoneAddNode
	- ZonePublish
	- ZoneChangeset

Parameters.Name: dynPassword
Parameters.Label: Password
Parameters.HelpText: Password of the user to access Dyn

Parameters.Name: dynZone
Parameters.Label: Dyn Zone
Parameters.HelpText:
The name of the Zone, where you want the A record to be created

For example: myzone.com

Parameters.Name: dynFQDN
Parameters.Label: Fully Qualified Domain Name
Parameters.HelpText:
The name of the A record that is being created in Fully Qualified Domain Name format

For example: newrecord.myzone.com

Parameters.Name: dynCorrectTTL
Parameters.Label: Time to Live
Parameters.HelpText: Limits the lifespan or lifetime of data in a computer network

Parameters.Name: dynCorrectIPAddress
Parameters.Label: IPv4 Address
Parameters.HelpText: The IPv4 address of the new A record
